_README: This file is managed by LazyCue (see shelley/lazycue). Do NOT edit by hand — it is the cached, machine-generated DSL for a self-healing browser test. To change behavior, edit the test description and re-run LazyCue.
description: Navigate to /new. Type "Hello" into the message input (data-testid "message-input") and click the send button (data-testid "send-button"). Wait for the agent's reply text "Hello! I'm Shelley, your AI assistant. How can I help you today?" to appear on the page. Both the sent "Hello" message and that reply should be visible.

steps.text: Hello! I'm Shelley, your AI assistant. How can I help you today?
